//: Merge the hooks block below into ~/.claude/settings.json (global) or .claude/settings.json (per project). Each hook POSTs a status event to the overlay's listener on 127.0.0.1:8377; when the overlay isn't running, curl fails silently and Claude Code is unaffected. $TMUX_PANE ties the event to the exact tmux pane; cwd is the fallback key for non-tmux sessions.

hooks.command: payload=$(cat); printf '%s' "$payload" | grep -qi permission && curl -s -m 2 -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8377/event -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d "{\"status\":\"permission\",\"pane\":\"$TMUX_PANE\",\"cwd\":\"$PWD\"}" >/dev/null 2>&1; true
